compiled_state.title: [ticket-bridge-fsck]: _to_ns helper defined inside loop body -> minor inefficiency

compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: _to_ns helper is defined inside the for-loop body in audit_bridge_mappings() (ticket-bridge-fsck.py). Python re-creates the function object on each iteration. Should be a module-level or outer-function helper.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-bridge-fsck.py
Category: maintainability
